_comment: Curated ingredient name -> exact KAMIS item-names it may match. The KAMIS item-name is the part BEFORE '/' in dailySalesList item_name (kamis.py already splits on '/'). Matching is EXACT string equality after .strip() against this list. An empty list means the ingredient NEVER matches a live price row (used to kill the false 김치<-김 positive: KAMIS itemname '김' is laver, kindname 마른김/구운김). Each list also includes the curated name itself so the bundled sample_prices.json (which keys rows by the curated name) keeps matching. KAMIS authoritative itemnames verified against _kamis_productinfo.json / _codemap.txt on 2026-05-18.
